EMAIL MARKETING ACTION PLAN
This action plan is meant to supplement the Email Marketing Manual
(10xresource.com/em1) to make sure you’re crystal clear on the specific action steps to
take to get your desired results.
Keep in mind that much of this work only needs to be done once. When complete, your
emails can be sent either via automation or by a team member. When in doubt, refer to
the manual!
Get Your Email Marketer Set Up,
Generating Leads and Making Sales!
YOUR GOAL
You can use any email system, but we recommend either Mailchimp (free to start
and relatively simple) or Hubspot (more advanced and expensive).
• Sign up for MailChimp (10xresource.com/mailchimp)
• Sign up for Hubspot (10xresource.com/hubspot)
Once you’ve got an email marketer, you’ll need to learn your way around and
do some basic setup.
Recommended Resource:
• Mailchimp Tour and Setup (10xresource.com/em7)
Recommended Resource:
COMPLETE SETUP AND LEARN THE BASICS	STEP
2
CREATE EMAIL MARKETING SYSTEM ACCOUNT	STEP
1

-- 1 of 5 --

Your email marketer will serve as your central database for communication with
customers and subscribers. The steps needed to import will vary based on your email
provider. Skip this step if you don’t have a pre-existing email list.
• Import Contacts into Mailchimp (10xresource.com/em23)
• Import Contacts into Hubspot (10xresource.com/em24)
Recommended Resource:
IMPORT LIST (OPTIONAL IF YOU HAVE ONE)	STEP
3
Even if you just send your first email to yourself, it will be good to send a broadcast to
familiarize yourself with the process.
• Send Broadcasts in Mailchimp (10xresource.com/em9)
• Mailchimp Broadcast Checklist (10xdownload.com/em3)
Recommended Resource:
SEND OUT A TEST EMAIL BROADCAST	STEP
4
In addition to a general list, you will likely want to create further segments to better
serve and monetize your subscribers. For example, you might have lists for anyone
who has purchased a product, completed a certain action or shown interest in a
service. Every business will be different.
Be sure to refer to the Email Marketing Manual to learn more about overall email
marketing strategy including list segmentation.
• Segmentation Strategy Flowchart (10xdownload.com/em2)
• Lists and Segmentation in Mailchimp (10xresource.com/em8)
Recommended Resource:
CREATE STRATEGY FOR LIST SEGMENTATION	STEP
5
2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

Web forms will serve as your primary means for adding people to your email lists.
If you use a 3rd party website or funnel program such as Clickfunnels
(10xresource.com/clickfunnels) you can easily integrate your pages to your email
marketer with a few clicks. Otherwise, you’ll need to add web forms provided by
your email provider.
NOTE: You can learn more about funnels and lead generation in the 10X Sales
Funnel System.
• Web forms in Mailchimp (10xresource.com/em26)
• Web forms in Hubspot (10xresource.com/em25)
Recommended Resource:
CONNECT YOUR FUNNELS/SITES TO YOUR EMAIL MARKETER	STEP
6
Automated emails sequences can be triggered by a wide variety of actions,
including a new subscriber being added to your list, the purchase of a product,
the download of a report, the clicking of a link and limitless other reasons. These
sequences will often work in conjunction with your segmented lists.
Once you’ve established multiple automated sequences, you can start to
connect them into what is referred to as a “customer journey”.
• Customer Journey Flowchart (10xdownload.com/em1)
• Automated Emails in Mailchimp (10xresource.com/em10)
• Mailchimp Automation Checklist (10xdownload.com/em4)
Recommended Resource:
SET UP DESIRED AUTOMATED EMAIL SEQUENCES	STEP
7
2023 Cardone Training Technologies, Inc. All rights reserved.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 5 --

Remember, your income will be in direct proportion to your ability to build an
email list and build a relationship with them. The 10X Email Marketing Manual
(10xresource.com/em1) goes into great detail about how to craft and send
effective emails. Additionally, we’ve provided real world examples of winning
email campaigns inside the swipe files.
NOTE: You can learn more about advertising and other means of driving traffic
in the various 10X Marketing Systems.
• Email Marketing Manual (10xresource.com/em1)
• Indoctrination Sequence Swipe File (10xdownload.com/em7)
• Sales Sequence Swipe File (10xdownload.com/em8)
• Buyer Sequence Swipe File (10xdownload.com/em9)
• Abandoner Sequence Swipe File (10xdownload.com/em10)
Recommended Resource:
GROW YOUR LIST AND START MAKING MONEY!	STEP
8
